subtitle.disconnected: Connect WhatsApp to let Wavi start organizing your chaotic digital life.
subtitle.noGroups: WhatsApp is linked — register a group so Wavi has somewhere witty to work.
subtitle.active: Wavi is live in {count} {groups} and ready to roast.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.viewSubtitle: See what Wavi has been up to

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.waOffline: Agent is offline. Head to Connect to scan the QR code.
recentActivity.waOnline: Agent session is connected and listening.
recentActivity.intelligenceBody: Activity feed will fill up once groups are active. For now, Wavi is sharpening its wit.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Register WhatsApp groups where Wavi should listen and reply

empty.title: No groups registered yet
empty.body: Connect WhatsApp, then add a group you're already in so Wavi knows where to show up.

discover.title: Add group from WhatsApp
discover.subtitle: Groups your linked WhatsApp account is already in
discover.empty: No group chats found on this WhatsApp account.
discover.connectHint: Make sure WhatsApp is connected under Agent → WhatsApp, and that this account is in at least one group.

setup.title: Setup
setup.body: Set the group to {live} so Wavi replies when someone tags {mention} in the chat.

connect.title: Connect WhatsApp
connect.subtitle: Scan the QR code to link your WhatsApp account to Wavi

connected.title: WhatsApp connected
connected.body: Your agent is linked and ready.

linking.title: Link Wavi to WhatsApp
linking.tagline: Wavi is waiting to roast your friends…

steps.title: How to link
steps.step3: Point your phone at the code to {capture}

status.scan: Scan with your phone to connect

connect.hint: Keep your phone on Wi-Fi for a faster sync. QR refreshes automatically.

errors.timeout: QR is taking too long. Make sure the API is running locally and VITE_API_URL points to it (use /api for local dev).
errors.apiDown: Could not reach the API. Start it with `bun run dev` from the repo root, then retry.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Recent Wavi replies across your registered groups

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Once Wavi starts replying in your groups, you'll see the feed here.

ingest.title: Upload chat history
ingest.body: Export your WhatsApp group chat as a {ext} file and upload it to build member profiles, relationship maps, and Wavi's group character.
ingest.dragDrop: Drag & drop a WhatsApp export here, or

members.title: Member profiles
members.empty: Member profiles will appear after uploading chat history

dynamics.title: Group dynamics
dynamics.empty: Group dynamics will appear after uploading chat history
